info.description: This is a sample server for a scheduling application.
info.title: Jadwalin API

post.description: Sends an OTP to the registered phone number for login.
Verifies the OTP for login and returns a JWT token.
Sends an OTP to the user's registered phone number for verification.
Returns all available time slots for a given treatment, staff, and date
post.summary: Get available time slots for a treatment + staff + date

get.description: Returns all bookings for a given user (must match authenticated user)

post.description: Assigns a treatment to a staff member (admin only)
post.summary: Assign a treatment skill to a staff

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all staff-skill assignments, with optional search by staff name
get.summary: List all staff-skill assignments with pagination

parameters.description: Search keyword (matches staff name or phone)
parameters.name: search

get.description: Returns all treatments a staff member can perform
get.summary: List skills for a staff member

get.description: Returns all staff members skilled at a given treatment
get.summary: List staff who can perform a treatment

get.description: Returns a single staff-skill assignment with joined user and treatment
get.summary: Get a staff skill by ID

delete.description: Unassigns a treatment from a staff member (admin only)
delete.summary: Remove a skill from a staff

get.description: Returns a paginated list of treatments with optional search

delete.description: Deletes a treatment by ID (soft delete)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users, with optional search and role filter.

post.description: Registers a new staff with the provided details.
Verifies a user by checking the provided OTP against the stored one.

put.description: Updates an existing user's profile (phone, email, address, full name, photo). All fields are optional.

delete.description: Deletes a user by ID (soft delete).

post.description: Uploads a photo for a specific user.
